basic_details.job_title: Simdega District Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Simdega District Support Person Notification 2026 has been released on the official website simdega.nic.in. The recruitment is being conducted for the engagement of Support Persons under a contractual arrangement through Simdega District Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 35 years Maximum Age: 60 years

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate or Graduate in any discipline with minimum two years of work experience in the relevant field.
qualification.details: Support Person: Post Graduate in Arts/Commerce/Science/Law/Psychology/Social Work/Child Psychology/Vernacular Language or Graduation in any stream At least two years of work experience in the relevant field.

salary_details.details: Maximum Rs. 5000/- per case (M.B.V. & S.S.U.V.) in the light of S.No.-1 of Jharkhand Notification No.-525 / Dated-09.05.2025

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Simdega District Support Person Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.simdega.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Simdega District Support Person Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Simdega District सहायक व्यक्ति (Support Person) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Simdega District सहायक व्यक्ति (Support Person) recruitment is 16-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form via registered post or speed post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the सहायक व्यक्ति (Support Person) post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the सहायक व्यक्ति (Support Person) post is between 35 to 60 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the सहायक व्यक्ति (Support Person) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a postgraduate degree or a graduate degree in any faculty, along with at least two years of experience in a relevant field.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the सहायक व्यक्ति (Support Person) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the सहायक व्यक्ति (Support Person) post is a maximum of Rs. 5000/- per case.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the सहायक व्यक्ति (Support Person) post?
faq.answer: The official notification indicates 0 vacancies for the सहायक व्यक्ति (Support Person) post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes evaluation of educational qualifications, work experience, and an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where should I send the application form?
faq.answer: The application form should be sent to the District Child Protection Office, Information and Public Relations Office Simdega, First Floor, Pincode-835223.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the सहायक व्यक्ति (Support Person) position?
faq.answer: The job type for the सहायक व्यक्ति (Support Person) position is Contractual.
